steps.title: Identify the essential name
steps.content: The phrase fellow OECD member nation needs the specific nation name to complete it. South Korea is essential identifying information, so the sentence should not separate it with punctuation.

steps.title: Avoid separating the name
steps.content: Choice A uses a colon, Choice C uses a comma, and Choice D uses a dash, each incorrectly setting off the essential nation name. The smooth construction places the name directly after nation. The answer is B.
